name: @tootallnate/astc-wasm
description: ASTC LDR texture decoder compiled to WebAssembly.

scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --manifest-path crate/Cargo.toml && cp crate/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/tootallnate_astc_wasm.wasm src/astc.wasm
scripts.build: if command -v cargo > /dev/null && rustup target list --installed | grep -q wasm32-unknown-unknown; then npm run build:wasm; fi && tsc && cp src/astc.wasm dist/astc.wasm
